courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: Technical Vertical Slice Showcase Game
genericDescription: Synthesize math, technical art, optimization, and production practice; present a slice that proves a technically demanding direction is feasible.
specificDescription: Build a showcase-ready game over a multi-week sprint. It must include at least one math-driven mechanic, one shader/material or procedural visual system, profiling evidence, sprint board history, final build, public page, credits, and postmortem.
gradingRubric: 30 pts final game quality; 20 pts technical ambition and reliability; 20 pts production process; 15 pts polish/presentation; 15 pts reflective analysis.
